# This file is maintained in the source repository.
# Canonical URL: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lpalbou/abstractmusic/main/llms.txt
# 
# Fetch the latest version directly:
#   curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lpalbou/abstractmusic/main/llms.txt

# AbstractMusic

> Model-agnostic remote and local music and audio generation abstractions for the Abstract ecosystem.

Use this index to find the canonical docs for installing AbstractMusic, selecting remote or local
generation backends, using the CLI/API, integrating with AbstractCore, and releasing the package.

## Core Docs

- [README.md](README.md): project overview, install profiles, quick starts, CLI examples, text planning boundary, licensing, and Apple/MPS notes.
- [docs/README.md](docs/README.md): documentation index for users, contributors, and tools.
- [docs/getting-started.md](docs/getting-started.md): install commands, first generation examples, CLI and REPL usage, and real-model smoke testing.
- [docs/repl.md](docs/repl.md): REPL guide: engines vs models, discovery commands, switching rules, offline/download toggle, and duration limits.
- [docs/architecture.md](docs/architecture.md): provider boundary, text planning boundary, dependency policy, precision policy, and AbstractCore integration shape.
- [docs/api.md](docs/api.md): `MusicManager`, request fields, text planner injection, model registry, and built-in backend kinds.
- [docs/models.md](docs/models.md): reviewed model metadata, provider status, license notes, and precision rules.
- [docs/faq.md](docs/faq.md): recurring model, testing, provider, and quantization questions.
- [docs/troubleshooting.md](docs/troubleshooting.md): common setup, Hugging Face, MPS, repetition, Stable Audio, Stable Audio 3, and release failures.
- [docs/release.md](docs/release.md): version source, local preflight, release rehearsal, PyPI publishing, and GitHub Pages setup.

## Project Process

- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): user-visible release history.
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): local development setup, test commands, backend contribution rules, and backlog process.
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): vulnerability reporting policy.
- [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md): contributor behavior expectations.
- [ACKNOWLEDGMENTS.md](ACKNOWLEDGMENTS.md): upstream ecosystem and model-credit notes.

## Design And Roadmap

- [docs/adr/README.md](docs/adr/README.md): architecture decision records.
- [docs/adr/0001_music_provider_abstraction_and_dependency_policy.md](docs/adr/0001_music_provider_abstraction_and_dependency_policy.md): provider abstraction and dependency policy.
- [docs/backlog/overview.md](docs/backlog/overview.md): backlog process and current planning status.
- [docs/backlog/README.md](docs/backlog/README.md): backlog index.
